metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0000

metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0001
text: # Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0001
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0002
text: [Analysis](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/analyses/index.html)

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0002
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0003
text: [Cross-sector](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/alle-sectoren/index.html)

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0003
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0004
text: [Julia Krauwer](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/auteurs/julia-krauwer/index.html)

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0004
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0005
text: Companies that use computing power and data storage in the cloud and want to make their IT greener need to know where they can make gains. For now, however, cloud providers are not sharing all the figures on energy use and CO₂ emissions, and they each do so in a different way.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0005
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0006
text: Listen to the segment with Sector Banker Julia Krauwer on the importance of good data for making IT more sustainable.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0006
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0007
text: As a result, IT teams do not know where they can achieve the most sustainability gains, and they cannot measure the impact of optimisations. For the time being there are no legal requirements or binding standards that set out which information cloud companies must make available to their own customers.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0007
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0008
text: Around the world, companies are moving their IT activities to the cloud, and both the development and use of artificial intelligence (AI) are pushing up demand for data centre capacity. According to an [estimate](https://www.iea.org/reports/energy-and-ai/energy-supply-for-ai) by the International Energy Agency, global electricity consumption by data centres in 2024 was around 460 terawatt-hours (TWh), equal to the annual consumption of countries such as Sweden or Argentina. By 2030 the agency expects it to more than double to 1,000 TWh. About 40 per cent of that power will then come from renewable sources, but nearly half will still require coal- and gas-fired power stations. The carbon footprint of digitalisation will therefore remain substantial for the time being.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0008
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0009
text: Data centres have become increasingly efficient in recent years. This is largely due to scaling up; a large data centre can spread the energy used to cool servers — a relatively large share of power consumption — across many customers. There has also been progress with new, more energy-efficient cooling techniques and software to manage the indoor climate. However, users of AI and cloud services, which determine demand for data centre capacity, in practice lack sufficient tools to reduce the negative environmental effects of their IT efforts.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0009
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0010
text: “Greening IT always starts with the right information,” says Wiebren van der Zee, a specialist in green IT at ABN AMRO. “Think of data on energy and water use, emissions, and use of raw materials. In our IT organisation we collect these data for our employees’ workstations — the laptops and monitors — but also for our own data centres and the cloud services we procure.”

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0010
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0011
text: Together with various organisations from the Nationale Coalitie Duurzame Digitalisering (NCDD), ABN AMRO has developed the [Sustainable IT Impact Assessment](https://eur03.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcoalitieduurzamedigitalisering.nl%2Fsustainable-it-impact-assessment-siia%2F&data=05%7C02%7Cjulia.krauwer%40nl.abnamro.com%7C9948116aa7d649b3c17508de1082ebd8%7C3a15904d3fd94256a753beb05cdf0c6d%7C0%7C0%7C638966351662129336%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=Yz6QXd%2FJKDj3vTjpdic9%2FGPln8C8x2QH6hBRajvDbgc%3D&reserved=0) (SIIA). This tool offers practical guidance and extensive background information to get started with making IT more sustainable. The advice is based, among other things, on the concrete experiences of businesses and public authorities.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0011
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0012
text: Large cloud providers have been trying for some years to meet this information need through CO₂ dashboards that allow their customers to keep track of the emissions from their digital efforts. Willem Jan Groenewoud, CEO of software company Ab Ovo, welcomes this wave: “It is good that they are providing more transparency than a few years ago. Measurement is knowledge.” The company strongly focuses on making the software it develops for its customers’ mission-critical processes more sustainable. “We assume a scenario in which energy may be rationed, and therefore design software that uses as little energy as possible.”

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0012
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0013
text: The cloud world is far more transparent than a few years ago, but there is still much to criticise about the information provided. Not all the required data are supplied, and measurement methods and the level of detail differ greatly between providers.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0013
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0014
text: It starts with how cloud companies report their own, organisation-wide emissions. According to an analysis by the British newspaper The Guardian, the data centres owned by the largest tech companies emitted almost [eight times](https://www.theguardian.com/technology/2024/sep/15/data-center-gas-emissions-tech) more than reported in total. This analysis covered data from 2020 through 2022.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0014
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0015
text: The difference can be explained by the measurement method. Often it is “market-based”. This means that providers calculate their CO₂ emissions on the basis of the number of certificates for green energy purchased or long-term power purchase agreements for energy from, for example, a wind farm. Such arrangements say nothing about the actual power mix at the data centre’s location. “It is a paper reality,” says Van der Zee of ABN AMRO. “Green energy is being shifted administratively all over the world.”

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0015
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0016
text: For example, a cloud provider can buy “guarantees of origin” for a hydroelectric plant in Norway and allocate them in the accounts to a server farm in Ireland, while that site partly runs on electricity from coal-fired power stations. On paper the footprint is then zero, but in reality there is definitely CO₂ emitted through the use of fossil energy.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0016
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0017
text: Under the European sustainability law CSRD, short for Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive, market-based reporting alone is no longer enough. On the one hand, organisations should be encouraged to purchase green energy and it is good that they provide insight into these efforts. On the other hand, the market-based measurement method paints too rosy a picture of the actual emissions from electricity generation. That is why the CSRD also requires companies to report “location-based”. Here the average power mix in the region where the company or data centre sources its electricity is the starting point.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0017
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0018
text: Both measurement methods also appear in cloud companies’ emissions dashboards. However, the location-based figures are not always shown as prominently. At Amazon, the market-based emissions data are foregrounded, and users must click through to gain insight into the location-based figures. Microsoft even omits location-based emissions entirely from its dashboard.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0018
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0019
text: Location-based emissions are calculated by multiplying electricity consumption in kilowatt-hours (kWh) by the local “emission factor”. This shows how much CO₂-equivalent is released on average in producing 1 kWh of electricity. In regions with wind turbines or hydroelectric plants, the emission factor is lower than in regions where electricity is mainly generated in coal- or gas-fired power stations. The location-based method is an average and does not require insight into daily or hourly fluctuations in the energy mix.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0019
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0020
text: In the world of emissions dashboards there are no binding standards, and customers of cloud services are in practice dependent on the willingness of their cloud providers to share information. This leads to great variation in the level of detail. Most offer monthly figures, but the update frequency differs. Some update continuously, others are months behind. There is also variation in granularity; sometimes emissions are shown only per organisation or region, at other times you can also monitor at the level of individual services or projects.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0020
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0021
text: Not all dashboards also include scope 3 emissions in their calculations. Whereas scopes 1 and 2 in this case concern the use of fossil energy and fossil-generated electricity to keep data centres running, scope 3 concerns the more indirect emissions. These are caused, for example, by the production and disposal of IT equipment, and the construction of data centres and offices. The cloud providers that report at scope 3 level do not do so consistently either; one limits itself to hardware production, while another also includes, for example, operating the staff canteen.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0021
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0022
text: Boavizta, an initiative of dozens of European IT companies and consultancies, has developed an unambiguous way to calculate the climate impact of digital infrastructure. At present every cloud provider calculates in its own way, creating an incomplete picture and making figures hard to compare between suppliers. Boavizta, for example, provides data on the environmental effects of producing and transporting servers, which companies can use for a more thorough calculation of the ecological footprint of their IT activities. Resilio also offers such data, combined with advice, but as a commercial service.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0022
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0023
text: Cloud dashboards are often primarily aimed at insight and reporting. It is positive that some providers also give concrete advice on how companies can reduce their emissions. Microsoft and Google, for example, suggest scaling down unused capacity.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0023
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0024
text: However, for organisations with a rich IT landscape it is difficult to gain insight into emissions at application level. Software usually consists of several components that are spread across projects, regions or services. As a result, the direct effects of changes made by development teams — “lighter” code, or a more efficient architecture — easily remain out of sight. “This is why we have developed our own AI-driven tooling for this,” says Groenewoud of software company Ab Ovo.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0024
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0025
text: According to Max Schulze, founder of the Sustainable Digital Infrastructure Alliance (SDIA), the focus on emissions is actually insufficient. “We should optimise for lower energy use, for fewer data centres. We live on a continent with limited space and resources,” he says.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0025
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0026
text: The other experts also recognise that green IT starts with insight into energy use. “A data centre’s emissions are not a pure measurement instrument,” says Groenewoud of Ab Ovo. “We first map the electricity used in kilowatt-hours at function level. Only then do we look at the location of the data centre and the energy mix at that site.”

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0026
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0027
text: None of the cloud providers, however, provides insight into the number of kWh their customers consume. Illogical, says Schulze of the SDIA, because you must always start with the efficiency of your product. “If you buy a car, you want to know how many kilometres you can drive on a litre of fuel to get a picture of the vehicle’s efficiency. Only after that do you translate it into the number of grams of CO₂-equivalent per kilometre.”

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0027
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0028
text: Various parties are stepping into the gap created by the limited information provided by cloud providers. One example is Cloud Carbon Footprint (CCF), an open-source tool that reads the actual use of cloud services and converts it into both kilowatt-hours (kWh) and CO₂ emissions. These data are also made available hourly, allowing IT teams to see, for example, when applications are used most and which systems keep running unnecessarily at night.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0028
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0029
text: Although it can be a good starting point for organisations seeking extra insight, with open-source services such as CCF there is no guarantee that they will be updated in a timely and regular manner. Commercial parties do offer that guarantee, and various paid services have been launched in recent years, including Greenpixie.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0029
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0030
text: All services, from the cloud providers’ own dashboards to externally developed solutions, are based on assumptions about the energy use of the servers and the digital services running on them. That is why project NADIKI, an initiative by SDIA together with the University of Stuttgart and data centre operator Kolo, goes right back to the source: the data centre. It collects live measurements via sensors and links them to the current carbon intensity of the power grid. “We have sensors everywhere, from the power supply of the entire data centre, down to rack and server level,” says Schulze. This information is used to capture energy use and emissions for specific workloads.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0030
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0031
text: Schulze: “This is the first time that energy and emissions are measured end to end.” The project is still in the pilot phase, but it does show that improvement is possible compared with current methodologies.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0031
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0032
text: When the emissions dashboards were first launched, they were greeted as a welcome and much-needed feature. Some of the cloud service providers have big ambitions around transparency and see it as a source of differentiation. Across the board, however, the pace differs greatly.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0032
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0033
text: According to Van der Zee of ABN AMRO, organisations should make their wishes known to their IT suppliers. “They should keep communicating about the type of information they need.” As long as the information provision is not optimal, the gap will be filled by open-source tools and the services of specialised software companies.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0033
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0034
text: There are also standards, such as those from Boavizta, and the Greenhouse Gas Protocol also has IT-specific guidelines. There are, however, no real obligations, which unnecessarily presents challenges for organisations that want to make their IT greener. Regulation can help and ensure that all players report in the same way.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0034
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion

id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0035
text: Technology, Media & Telecom (TMT) is one of the fastest-growing sectors. Helped by the increasing use of software, algorithms and sensors, this sector is at the heart of the digital renewal of other sectors.

metadata.chunk_id: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie__c4-paragraph__0035
metadata.source_slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
metadata.source_title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion
